summary: Russell arrives at his Silverstone home race brimming with confidence after dismantling the field in Austria, seeking to capitalize on Mercedes' momentum against Verstappen's dominant Red Bull. Hamilton faces an unfamiliar Silverstone setup with the new-generation cars, putting both Ferrari drivers on unequal footing as the circuit demands a complete tactical reset. A victory for Russell on home soil could propel Mercedes into genuine title contention, while Hamilton must prove Ferrari can challenge at high-speed circuits to keep his championship hopes alive.
